problem.description: While conventional solutions only provide superficial hydration, Evocarelab works from within, fusing advanced biotechnology with luxury natural ingredients for an immediate and lasting lifting effect.

product.textureQuote: "A silken caress that melts instantly into your skin."
product.defaultDesc: Our master formula combining low molecular weight biomimetic collagen with a triple hyaluronic acid complex.

ingredients.title: Molecular
ingredients.ing1_desc: Rapidly hydrates the stratum corneum and instantly relieves dryness and tightness.
ingredients.ing2_desc: Ultra-small molecules that penetrate deeply and increase the structural hydration level.
ingredients.ing3_desc: Improves skin adhesion and moisture retention capacity, prolonging the hydrating effect.

howtouse.title: The art of
howtouse.step0_desc: Your skin is unique. Apply a small amount behind the ear and wait 24 to 48 hours to ensure perfect harmony with your dermis.
howtouse.step1_desc: Deeply clean your skin to ensure maximum absorption of micronutrients.
howtouse.step2_desc: Spread the mask over a clean face for 15–20 minutes.
howtouse.step3_desc: Use 2–3 times per week or according to your skin's specific needs.
howtouse.step4_desc: Remove and massage the excess essence for a smooth, plump, and radiant finish.

testimonials.title: Voices of the
testimonials.t1_quote: It is the first mask that truly changes my skin texture in just 15 minutes. Essential.
testimonials.t2_quote: Minimalism taken to cosmetics. The results are as clean as its design.
testimonials.t3_quote: My secret before every photo shoot. A boost of light that I haven't found in any other brand.

philosophy.quote: "We believe that real luxury lies in the simplicity of the essential and in the honesty of what you apply to your skin."

results.title: Cellular architecture
results.description: After a 28-day protocol with our biocellulose mask, results are visible. Observe the regeneration of the skin barrier and the redensification of epidermal tissue.
results.cardDesc: Clinical visualization of cellular redensification after 4 applications.

benefits.quote: "My skin has never felt so elastic and alive. It's as if every pore has awakened after years of lethargy."
benefits.evaluation: Evaluated by independent cosmetologists under controlled clinical conditions.
benefits.leaf01_desc: Structural water for every epidermal layer.
benefits.leaf02_desc: Immediate flash effect from the first session.

problem.description: Evocarelab uses medical-grade biocellulose and nanotechnology to ensure that active ingredients don't just stay on the stratum corneum, but penetrate where they really matter.
